10.sourceTitle: BBB Cycling CoreCap AL Valve BTI-166 Tubeless Valves - BIKE24
10.extractionRationale: Single retail price found on BIKE24 for CoreCap product (2 pieces set): 20,16 EUR. This is the median price as only one price point was identified in the evidence.

27.sourceTitle: BBB Cycling CoreCap AL Valve BTI-166 Tubeless Ventil product pages
27.evidenceText: Distinct product URLs found: p1993551.html, p1993549.html, p1993550.html, p1993546.html - all are CoreCap AL Valve BTI-166 product pages with different variants (color/length combinations)
27.extractionRationale: Counted unique product page URLs from the evidence. Source 2 is a category page (not a distinct product listing), so it was excluded. The four p-numbered URLs represent distinct product listing pages for CoreCap valves, even though they are different variants of the same product model.

30.sourceTitle: BBB Cycling CoreCap BTI-165 Ventilkern - blau | 2 Stück | BIKE24
30.evidenceText: No stock status indicators found in either source listing. Content consists solely of product descriptions without availability information.
30.extractionRationale: Stock status cannot be determined from the provided text. Neither source explicitly mentions availability status, out-of-stock indicators, or related terms in German or English.

56.sourceTitle: Schwalbe Clik Valve kaufen - Top Auswahl - BIKE24
56.evidenceText: Distinct Schwalbe inner tube models found: No. 15 (28"/700C), No. 17 (28"), No. 17-EL (28"), No. 19 (27.5/28/29"), No. 19-EL (27.5/28/29"), No. 19L-EL (27.5/28/29"), No. 14 (27.5"/650B), No. 13 (26") - all with Clik Valve (SCV). Excluded: conversion kits and valve accessories.
56.extractionRationale: Counted all distinct inner tube models/SKUs with Clik Valve (SCV) designation across the 5 sources. Each model number (No. 13, 14, 15, 17, 17-EL, 19, 19-EL, 19L-EL) represents a unique tube model. Excluded conversion kits (Umrüstkit), valve sets, and pump adapters as instructed.

61.sourceTitle: LME Aluminium Alloy | London Metal Exchange
61.extractionRationale: Extracted 3175.00 from LME's official aluminium alloy prices. This is the current price displayed on the LME official website, representing the higher of the posted prices. Note: This is for LME Aluminium Alloy specifically rather than standard aluminium; the source did not contain standard LME Aluminium spot price data.

62.sourceTitle: Aluminium Premium Duty paid US Midwest Historical Prices
62.extractionRationale: The most recent price point from Oct 29, 2025 shows 1,793.99. This value is interpreted as cents per pound based on standard commodity premium quotation conventions. Converting to USD/lb: 1,793.99 cents ÷ 100 = 17.9399 USD/lb, rounded to 17.94.
